roadmap.objective: Infrastructure setup — project scaffold, database, and deployment pipeline
deliverables: Next.js project initialized with TypeScript, Tailwind, and path aliases
Supabase project created (free tier) with all 6 tables deployed
Environment variables configured (.env.local)
Encryption key generated and stored
Vercel deployment working (Hello World landing page)
Folder structure matches production layout
roadmap.validation_metric: npm run build succeeds; Vercel deployment live; Supabase tables queryable
roadmap.revenue_justification: Zero — Day 1 is pure infrastructure. No customer-facing value yet.
roadmap.exit_valuation_impact: Establishes production infrastructure ($0 direct value, but prerequisite for all other days)

roadmap.objective: Core interception pipeline — request parsing and risk classification
deliverables: Request parser handles OpenAI, Anthropic, and generic LLM API formats
Provider detector identifies target from URL patterns
Risk classifier with 16 built-in regex patterns across 4 categories
Obfuscation decoder (base64, hex) to prevent bypass
POST /api/gateway/intercept endpoint functional
Classification returns risk level, confidence, and detected entities
roadmap.validation_metric: Send test prompts containing SSNs, emails, API keys → correctly classified and blocked in <100ms
roadmap.revenue_justification: This is the core product. Without real-time interception, there is no product. Enables $500-2000/mo per customer pricing.
roadmap.exit_valuation_impact: Defensible IP — the classification pipeline is the core moat. Regex patterns are a starting point; the architecture supports ML upgrade. Worth ~$80,000 in defensible technology.

deliverables: AES-256-CBC encryption for quarantined prompt content
Quarantine handler creates encrypted queue entries
Priority-based queue ordering (CRITICAL first)
POST /api/quarantine/review for human decisions
GET /api/quarantine/review lists pending items
Quarantine dashboard panel with approve/reject actions
roadmap.validation_metric: Quarantined prompts are encrypted in DB; decryption works for authorized reviewers; review workflow completes end-to-end
roadmap.revenue_justification: Quarantine is the key differentiator vs. simple blockers. Compliance teams want review workflows, not just on/off switches. Justifies enterprise pricing ($1500+/mo).
roadmap.exit_valuation_impact: Enterprise workflow capability adds ~$60,000 to valuation through higher ARPU potential.

roadmap.objective: Audit logging with cryptographic integrity and compliance reports
deliverables: Compliance event logger with automatic seed anchoring
SHA-256 hash chain (seed anchor) for tamper detection
Merkle root computation for batch verification
Seed chain verification endpoint
GET /api/reports/generate creates CFO-ready audit reports
Reports include integrity proofs and EU AI Act compliance status
roadmap.validation_metric: 10+ events logged with seed anchors; chain verification passes; generated report contains correct aggregations and integrity data
roadmap.revenue_justification: Audit reports are what CFOs pay for. This is the deliverable that gets budget approval. Enables annual contract pricing ($15,000-25,000/year).
roadmap.exit_valuation_impact: Compliance reporting capability + cryptographic integrity = regulatory moat. Worth ~$70,000 — acquirers pay premium for compliance-ready products.

roadmap.objective: HITL approval system and notification pipeline
deliverables: HITL approval gate for all destructive operations
8 gated operation types (policy update, key rotation, etc.)
Slack notification integration for approval requests
24-hour timeout with auto-expiration
POST /api/policy/update with HITL gating
Approval decisions anchored with cryptographic seeds
roadmap.validation_metric: Policy update triggers approval request; Slack notification sent; approval/rejection resolves correctly; seed anchor created for decision
roadmap.revenue_justification: HITL is required for EU AI Act compliance (Article 14). Without it, the product cannot be sold to EU enterprises. Unlocks the entire EU market.
roadmap.exit_valuation_impact: EU AI Act compliance alignment adds ~$50,000 — regulatory positioning is a key acquisition driver for compliance acquirers.

roadmap.objective: Dashboard polish, edge cases, and security hardening
deliverables: Complete dashboard with overview, events, and quarantine tabs
Input validation on all API endpoints (Zod schemas)
Rate limiting on gateway endpoint
ReDoS protection (match count caps, input truncation)
Fail-closed behavior when Supabase is unavailable
Error handling and graceful degradation throughout
roadmap.validation_metric: Dashboard renders correctly; all edge cases handled (large prompts, DB downtime, obfuscated input); no unhandled exceptions in error scenarios
roadmap.revenue_justification: Polish and security hardening are what separate a demo from a product customers will pay for. Reduces churn risk and support burden.
roadmap.exit_valuation_impact: Production quality adds ~$20,000 — acquirers discount heavily for projects that need 'fixing' post-acquisition.

deliverables: Complete ARCHITECTURE.md with diagrams and threat model
Agent definition files (AGENTS.md, SOUL.md, TOOLS.md, MEMORY.md)
API documentation with request/response examples
Setup guide for new deployments (<30 min onboarding)
End-to-end test suite covering critical paths
Clean git history with meaningful commits
tasks.json roadmap as evidence of structured development
roadmap.validation_metric: A new developer can clone, configure, and deploy in under 30 minutes following the docs; all tests pass; documentation covers every component
roadmap.revenue_justification: Documentation and testing reduce acquisition risk, which directly increases willingness to pay. Acquirers want a product they can maintain.
roadmap.exit_valuation_impact: Acquisition-ready packaging adds ~$20,000 — complete documentation reduces due diligence time and integration risk.

valuation_summary.defensible_technology: $80,000 — Risk classification pipeline + cryptographic integrity chain
valuation_summary.enterprise_capability: $60,000 — Quarantine workflows, encrypted storage, review system
valuation_summary.compliance_positioning: $70,000 — Audit reports, EU AI Act alignment, CFO-ready deliverables
valuation_summary.regulatory_moat: $50,000 — HITL system satisfying Article 14 human oversight requirements
valuation_summary.production_quality: $20,000 — Security hardening, edge case handling, error recovery

recurring_revenue_projection.note: The $300,000 target is conservative — based on IP + early traction, not full ARR multiple.
